channel.title: startup on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in startup on Jonathan Ma

item.title: 77 Failed Startup Post-Mortems
item.description: Discover the reasons behind startup failure, from the founders themselves. (Source) All stories are attributed with their original source. This book is not intended to be republished for any kind of financial gain or sold for profit, all articles remain the property of their respective writers/owners/sites. I have merely packaged this information for my own (and your) reading convenience, so we might read through these amazing stories at our leisure on our Kindles, phone or ipads or whatever.
